brief.title: Saturday, July 11 — six things creators need to know

items.html: Meta killed its Instagram AI deepfake tagging tool within a week after backlash — check your own account's privacy settings now.
Apple is suing OpenAI for trade secret theft by senior employees, including hardware chief Tang Tan, over confidential project codes and unreleased products.
OpenAI's Atlas browser sunsets August 9 — agentic browsing moves to ChatGPT desktop and a Chrome extension, so migrate any browser workflows now.
Hugging Face's CEO says enterprises are ditching paid APIs for open-source models at scale — worth auditing whether proprietary costs still make sense.
Krea 2 Turbo in INT4 W4A4 drops to 11.88 GB, enabling faster inference on consumer GPUs — a practical swap if VRAM is your bottleneck.
An artist turned hand-drawn pencil sketches into a navigable 3D world using Blender geometry nodes and paper-as-emission remapping — a rare end-to-end technique demo.

tooldrop.name: Chiro Visuals Ivy Generator
tooldrop.blurb: Browser-based tool that grows procedural ivy and fig vines on 3D meshes in real time. Paint paths, adjust, export — built for environment artists who need quick organic foliage.

stories.title: Artist transforms 2D pencil sketch into navigable 3D world
stories.dek: Leteramma scanned hand drawings, remapped paper as emission, and composed them into a traversable animation using Blender's geometry nodes. Specific technical execution with clear artistic intent.

stories.title: Godot Road Generator adds procedural intersection lanes
stories.dek: TheDuckCow's open-source plugin now supports traffic lanes at intersections via community contribution. Includes customizable geometry, collision meshes, and AI lane pathfinding.
